issues.description: Identity has privileged group membership but MFA is not enabled.
issues.impact: Stolen credentials could provide elevated access without an additional verification factor.
issues.recommendation: Enable MFA and enforce privileged access policy.

issues.description: Terminated identity still has group memberships.
issues.impact: Leaver process may be incomplete, creating risk of unauthorized access.
issues.recommendation: Remove all access and validate offboarding controls.

issues.description: Identity has not logged in for 240 days but still has access.
issues.impact: Dormant access increases the risk of unnoticed compromise or unnecessary entitlement exposure.
issues.recommendation: Validate business need and remove access if no longer required.

issues.description: Identity record has no manager or accountable owner.
issues.impact: Access reviews and approvals may not have a valid business owner.
issues.recommendation: Assign a manager or application owner for governance accountability.

issues.description: Last login value is missing or not numeric.
issues.impact: Staleness checks cannot be trusted for this identity.
issues.recommendation: Fix source data format for last login information.
